message:
fix(agent): resolve tree entries by bare name, not just path key

The tree map is keyed by path (e.g., "utility/reader") but the LLM
sends bare names (e.g., "reader") via the delegate tool. Look up
the tree entry once using both strategies (path key first, then
findTreeEntryByName scan) and use the resolved entry for both spec
and tree context.

Also extracts getDelegatableAgents() and uses resolveRootToolsDir
when the agent tree is available.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
